caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium, delivering a speech against a textured green wall with architectural indentations and a vertical gold-trimmed glass pillar containing red flowers. He wears a light-colored kurta and a matching sleeveless jacket. In the beginning, he stands relatively still with his hands resting on or near the podium, looking slightly to his left. As the sequence progresses, he becomes more animated, using hand gestures to emphasize his points. He raises both hands and moves them in an expressive manner while continuing to look toward the audience. Two microphones are mounted on the podium, positioned in front of him throughout the scene. The background and his attire remain constant as he shifts from a composed stance to more active gesturing.
